MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER SQUARETRADE, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is taken off calendar. Petitioner filed a Request for Dismissal of entire action on January 2, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
